title: Don't Cry with Your Mouth Full
overview: Annie, a 16 years old girl, loves Frédéric who is away doing his national service. During her holidays in the country, she meets Alexandre. He's older, owns a car and she experiences the "first time" with him. Back during a leave, Frédéric finds his sweetheart in the arms of this clumsy oaf and eventually hits it off with him.

trailers.title: Extrait de "Pleure pas la bouche pleine", de Pascal Thomas, 1973.
